response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified three distinct songs in the video based on on-screen text overlays and performance shifts. 2. Song 1 'Ai no Scenario' is originally by CHiCO with HoneyWorks. Found lyrics via search. 3. Song 2 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!' is from 'Umamusume: Pretty Derby', composed by Kan Irei. Found lyrics. 4. Song 3 'Legend-Changer' is from 'Umamusume: Pretty Derby', composed by Takuya Kakehashi. Found lyrics. 5. Mapped each song to its corresponding timestamped scene and constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring three musical performances by various VTubers, performing 'Ai no Scenario' and songs from the 'Umamusume: Pretty Derby' franchise.

scenes.description: The song 'Ai no Scenario' is performed by a VTuber. Text 'アイのシナリオ' appears at the beginning.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The unwavering justice that deceives the world
Untie it, the truth is in these hands
Bold and fearless shadows dance brilliantly
Tell me the secret you're hiding, someday
No one can touch it with these extended hands
Let me see the world you're hiding
Swaying, complex heart
Solve it and take those eyes
Even if you're anxious and crying, you can't find it
Where did the truth you're aiming for disappear to?
Even if it's an answer that deceives the world
The palm I reach out, believing
I'll never run, I'm not afraid
Open your eyes and wipe away your weakness
Are you aware of the repeating destiny?
I'll tell you the secret I'm hiding, someday
The deceptive shadow approaching, you don't know
The sprouted memory is a necessary thorn that entangles
With the feeling I want to protect
Just face it and untie that bond
I'll save you as many times as it takes, that won't waver
Where did the hidden truth disappear to?
Even if I make the world my enemy
'Believe in me', only me, even the future
I'll never run, I have no hesitation
Break the scenario and resist
Even if I make the world my enemy
'Believe in me', the palm I reach out
I'll never let go, the thought (answer) has arrived
The tied destiny is in these hands
Even if it's a repeated answer
I'll never run, I'm not afraid
Resist
